{{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "burial"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under [[:Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones[[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox ancient site|type = [[Zenpokoenfun]] |name = Nagayama Kofun |image = [[File:Nagayama Kofun (Sakai) zenkei.JPG|280px]]
View of the tumulus (foreground: front mound, background: rear circular mound) | part_of = {{ill|Mozu Kofun Group|ja|百舌鳥古墳群|1=Mozu Tombs}} |location = {{ill|Higashi Nagayama-en|ja|東永山園}}, {{ill|Sakai-ku|ja|堺区}}, {{ill|Sakai|ja|堺市}}, Osaka Prefecture, Japan |coordinates = {{Coord|34|34|6|N|135|29|13|E|region:JP-27_type:landmark|display=inline,title|name=Nagayama Kofun}} |type = Keyhole-shaped kofun |Construction = Estimated 5th century |area = Mound length: 100 m |Occupant = Unknown |Imperial Tomb = Designated as a "Mozu Mimihara Naka no Misasagi" (陪冢) by the Imperial Household Agency |other_designation = Designated as a Sakai City other_designation: "Moat of Nagayama Kofun" |burial goods = None reported |image 2 = [[File:Nagayama Tomb Aerial photograph 2007.jpg|thumb|Aerial view of Nagayama Kofun (2007)
{{Aerial Photography of National Land}}]] }} '''Nagayama Kofun''' ({{lang|ja|永山古墳}}) is a {{ill|Zenpokoenfun|ja|前方後円墳|1=Zenpokoenfun}} located in {{ill|Higashi Nagayama-en|ja|東永山園}}, {{ill|Sakai-ku|ja|堺区}}, {{ill|Sakai|ja|堺市}}, Osaka Prefecture, Japan. It is one of the tumuli that comprise the {{ill|Mozu Kofun Group|ja|百舌鳥古墳群|1=Mozu Tombs}}, registered as part of the UNESCO World other_designation Site {{ill|Mozu-Furuichi Kofun Group|ja|百舌鳥・古市古墳群 -古代日本の墳墓群-}}. The tumulus is managed by the {{ill|Imperial Household Agency|ja|宮内庁}} as an associated mound (陪冢) of {{ill|Daisen Kofun|ja|大仙陵古墳|1=Daisenryō Kofun}}, other_designation1 as "Mozu Mimihara Naka no Misasagi." Its moat is a other_designation1 historic site by {{ill|Sakai|ja|堺市}}. == Overview == The Nagayama Kofun lies [[Category:pp error]]approximately 50 meters northwest of {{ill|Daisen Kofun|ja|大仙陵古墳|1=Daisenryō Kofun}}, oriented with its front portion facing south. The mound is 100 meters in total length, with a circular rear mound diameter of 63 meters and height of 10.3 meters, and a front mound width of 68.5 meters and height of 10.3 meters.{{Cite web|url=https://www.city.sakai.lg.jp/kanko/rekishi/dkofun/database/nagayama.html|title=Nagayama Kofun - World other_designation Component|publisher=Sakai City other_designation Division|accessdate=2021-pp-14}} The structure appear[[Category:pp to pp]]s to be two-tiered, but its proportions suggest it may have been built in three tiers.{{Cite book|title=Mozu Kofun Cluster: Sakai's other_designation|publisher=Sakai City other_designation Division|year=2014}} A moat encircles the kofun, with an earthen bridge crossing its eastern section. However, whether this feature dates back to the tumulus' original construction remains unclear.{{Cite web|url=https://kunishitei.bunka.go.jp/bsys/maindetails/9pp/00000141|title=Nagayama Kofun - National Cultural Property Database|publisher=Agency for Cultural Affairs|accessdate=2021-pp-14}} Excavations have not been conducted, and details about the internal structure, burial goods, or Interred_individual remain unknown. The kofun is believed to have been constructed in the early 5th century. == area == The tumulus' area are as follows: * Total length: 100 meters * Rear circular mound diameter: 63 meters; height: 10.3 meters * Front mound width: 68.5 meters; height: 10.3 meters == other_designation == === Sakai City other_designation === * Designated as the "Moat of Nagayama Kofun" on April pp, 2016. == World Heritage Status == In {{ill|2019|ja|2019th year }}, the Nagayama Kofun was registered as a component of the UNESCO World other_designation Site {{ill|Mozu-Furuichi Kofun Group|ja|百舌鳥・古市古墳群}}.{{Cite web|url=https://bunka.nii.ac.jp/special_content/hlinkJ|title=World other_designation: Mozu-Furuichi Kofun Group|publisher=Agency for Cultural Affairs|accessdate=2021-pp-14}} == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{Cite book|title=Japanese Kofun Encyclopedia|publisher=Tokyo-do Publishing|year=1989|author=Matsumura Takafumi|pages=428}} * {{Cite book|title=Mozu Kofun Cluster: Sakai's other_designation|publisher=Sakai City other_designation Division|year=2014}} == External Links == * [https://www.city.sakai.lg.jp/kanko/rekishi/dkofun/database/nagayama.html Nagayama Kofun - World other_designation Component] (Sakai City other_designation Division) * [https://www.city.sakai.lg.jp/kanko/rekishi/sei/kohun_siru/mozukofungunrist-shousai.html Mozu Kofun Cluster Detailed List] It is one of the tumuli that comprise the {{ill|Mozu Kofun Group|ja|百舌鳥古墳群|1=Mozu Tombs}}, registered as part of the UNESCO World other_designation Site {{ill|Mozu-Furuichi Kofun Group|ja|百舌鳥・古市古墳群 -古代日本の墳墓群-}}. The tumulus is managed by the {{ill|Imperial Household Agency|ja|宮内庁}} as an associated mound (陪冢) of {{ill|Daisen Kofun|ja|大仙陵古墳|1=Daisenryō Kofun}}, other_designation1 as "Mozu Mimihara Naka no Misasagi." Its moat is a other_designation1 historic site by {{ill|Sakai|ja|堺市}}. == Overview == The Nagayama Kofun lies [[Category:pp error]]approximately 50 meters northwest of {{ill|Daisen Kofun|ja|大仙陵古墳|1=Daisenryō Kofun}}, oriented with its front portion facing south. The mound is 100 meters in total length, with a circular rear mound diameter of 63 meters and height of 10.3 meters, and a front mound width of 68.5 meters and height of 10.3 meters.{{Cite web|url=https://www.city.sakai.lg.jp/kanko/rekishi/dkofun/database/nagayama.html|title=Nagayama Kofun - World other_designation Component|publisher=Sakai City other_designation Division|accessdate=2021-pp-14}} The structure appear[[Category:pp to pp]]s to be two-tiered, but its proportions suggest it may have been built in three tiers.{{Cite book|title=Mozu Kofun Cluster: Sakai's other_designation|publisher=Sakai City other_designation Division|year=2014}} A moat encircles the kofun, with an earthen bridge crossing its eastern section. However, whether this feature dates back to the tumulus' original construction remains unclear.{{Cite web|url=https://kunishitei.bunka.go.jp/bsys/maindetails/9pp/00000141|title=Nagayama Kofun - National Cultural Property Database|publisher=Agency for Cultural Affairs|accessdate=2021-pp-14}} Excavations have not been conducted, and details about the internal structure, burial goods, or Interred_individual remain unknown. The kofun is believed to have been constructed in the early 5th century. == area == The tumulus' area are as follows: * Total length: 100 meters * Rear circular mound diameter: 63 meters; height: 10.3 meters * Front mound width: 68.5 meters; height: 10.3 meters == other_designation == === Sakai City other_designation === * Designated as the "Moat of Nagayama Kofun" on April pp, 2016. == World Heritage Status == In {{ill|2019|ja|2019th year }}, the Nagayama Kofun was registered as a component of the UNESCO World other_designation Site {{ill|Mozu-Furuichi Kofun Group|ja|百舌鳥・古市古墳群}}.{{Cite web|url=https://bunka.nii.ac.jp/special_content/hlinkJ|title=World other_designation: Mozu-Furuichi Kofun Group|publisher=Agency for Cultural Affairs|accessdate=2021-pp-14}} == References == Sakai's other_designation|publisher=Sakai City other_designation Division|year=2014}} == External Links == * [https://www.city.sakai.lg.jp/kanko/rekishi/dkofun/database/nagayama.html Nagayama Kofun - World other_designation Component] (Sakai City other_designation Division) * [https://www.city.sakai.lg.jp/kanko/rekishi/sei/kohun_siru/mozukofungunrist-shousai.html Mozu Kofun Cluster Detailed List] Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox ancient site|type = [[Zenpokoenfun]] |name = Nagayama Kofun |image = [[File:Nagayama Kofun (Sakai) zenkei.JPG|280px]]

revision.comment: Removing from [[Category:Tier 2]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "burial"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under [[:Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones[[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox ancient site|type = [[Zenpokoenfun]] |name = Nagayama Kofun |image = [[File:Nagayama Kofun (Sakai) zenkei.JPG|280px]]
View of the tumulus (foreground: front mound, background: rear circular mound) | part_of = {{ill|Mozu Kofun Group|ja|百舌鳥古墳群|1=Mozu Tombs}} |location = {{ill|Higashi Nagayama-en|ja|東永山園}}, {{ill|Sakai-ku|ja|堺区}}, {{ill|Sakai|ja|堺市}}, Osaka Prefecture, Japan |coordinates = {{Coord|34|34|6|N|135|29|13|E|region:JP-27_type:landmark|display=inline,title|name=Nagayama Kofun}} |type = Keyhole-shaped kofun |Construction = Estimated 5th century |area = Mound length: 100 m |Occupant = Unknown |Imperial Tomb = Designated as a "Mozu Mimihara Naka no Misasagi" (陪冢) by the Imperial Household Agency |Historic Site = Designated as a Sakai City Historic Site: "Moat of Nagayama Kofun" |burial goods = None reported |image 2 = [[File:Nagayama Tomb Aerial photograph 2007.jpg|thumb|Aerial view of Nagayama Kofun (2007)
{{Aerial Photography of National Land}}]] }} '''Nagayama Kofun''' ({{lang|ja|永山古墳}}) is a {{ill|Zenpokoenfun|ja|前方後円墳|1=Zenpokoenfun}} located in {{ill|Higashi Nagayama-en|ja|東永山園}}, {{ill|Sakai-ku|ja|堺区}}, {{ill|Sakai|ja|堺市}}, Osaka Prefecture, Japan. It is one of the tumuli that comprise the {{ill|Mozu Kofun Group|ja|百舌鳥古墳群|1=Mozu Tombs}}, registered as part of the UNESCO World Historic Site Site {{ill|Mozu-Furuichi Kofun Group|ja|百舌鳥・古市古墳群 -古代日本の墳墓群-}}. The tumulus is managed by the {{ill|Imperial Household Agency|ja|宮内庁}} as an associated mound (陪冢) of {{ill|Daisen Kofun|ja|大仙陵古墳|1=Daisenryō Kofun}}, Historic Site1 as "Mozu Mimihara Naka no Misasagi." Its moat is a Historic Site1 historic site by {{ill|Sakai|ja|堺市}}. == Overview == The Nagayama Kofun lies [[Category:pp error]]approximately 50 meters northwest of {{ill|Daisen Kofun|ja|大仙陵古墳|1=Daisenryō Kofun}}, oriented with its front portion facing south. The mound is 100 meters in total length, with a circular rear mound diameter of 63 meters and height of 10.3 meters, and a front mound width of 68.5 meters and height of 10.3 meters.{{Cite web|url=https://www.city.sakai.lg.jp/kanko/rekishi/dkofun/database/nagayama.html|title=Nagayama Kofun - World Historic Site Component|publisher=Sakai City Historic Site Division|accessdate=2021-pp-14}} The structure appear[[Category:pp to pp]]s to be two-tiered, but its proportions suggest it may have been built in three tiers.{{Cite book|title=Mozu Kofun Cluster: Sakai's Historic Site|publisher=Sakai City Historic Site Division|year=2014}} A moat encircles the kofun, with an earthen bridge crossing its eastern section. However, whether this feature dates back to the tumulus' original construction remains unclear.{{Cite web|url=https://kunishitei.bunka.go.jp/bsys/maindetails/9pp/00000141|title=Nagayama Kofun - National Cultural Property Database|publisher=Agency for Cultural Affairs|accessdate=2021-pp-14}} Excavations have not been conducted, and details about the internal structure, burial goods, or Interred_individual remain unknown. The kofun is believed to have been constructed in the early 5th century. == area == The tumulus' area are as follows: * Total length: 100 meters * Rear circular mound diameter: 63 meters; height: 10.3 meters * Front mound width: 68.5 meters; height: 10.3 meters == Historic Site == === Sakai City Historic Site === * Designated as the "Moat of Nagayama Kofun" on April pp, 2016. == World Heritage Status == In {{ill|2019|ja|2019th year }}, the Nagayama Kofun was registered as a component of the UNESCO World Historic Site Site {{ill|Mozu-Furuichi Kofun Group|ja|百舌鳥・古市古墳群}}.{{Cite web|url=https://bunka.nii.ac.jp/special_content/hlinkJ|title=World Historic Site: Mozu-Furuichi Kofun Group|publisher=Agency for Cultural Affairs|accessdate=2021-pp-14}} == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{Cite book|title=Japanese Kofun Encyclopedia|publisher=Tokyo-do Publishing|year=1989|author=Matsumura Takafumi|pages=428}} * {{Cite book|title=Mozu Kofun Cluster: Sakai's Historic Site|publisher=Sakai City Historic Site Division|year=2014}} == External Links == * [https://www.city.sakai.lg.jp/kanko/rekishi/dkofun/database/nagayama.html Nagayama Kofun - World Historic Site Component] (Sakai City Historic Site Division) * [https://www.city.sakai.lg.jp/kanko/rekishi/sei/kohun_siru/mozukofungunrist-shousai.html Mozu Kofun Cluster Detailed List] (Sakai City World Heritage Division) [[Category:Kofun in Osaka]] [[Category:History of Sakai-ku]] [[Category:Mozu Kofun Group]] [[Category:Zenpokoenfun]] [[Category:Imperial Tombs]] [[Category:Completion tier View of the tumulus (foreground: front mound, background: rear circular mound) | part_of = {{ill|Mozu Kofun Group|ja|百舌鳥古墳群|1=Mozu Tombs|12=draft}} |location = {{ill|Higashi Nagayama-en|ja|東永山園|12=draft}}, {{ill|Sakai-ku|ja|堺区|12=draft}}, {{ill|Sakai|ja|堺市|12=draft}}, Osaka Prefecture, Japan |coordinates = {{Coord|34|34|6|N|135|29|13|E|region:JP-27_type:landmark|display=inline,title|name=Nagayama Kofun}} |type = Keyhole-shaped kofun |Construction = Estimated 5th century |area = Mound length: 100 m |Occupant = Unknown |Imperial Tomb = Designated as a "Mozu Mimihara Naka no Misasagi" (陪冢) by the Imperial Household Agency |Historic Site = Designated as a Sakai City Historic Site: "Moat of Nagayama Kofun" |burial goods = None reported |image 2 = [[File:Nagayama Tomb Aerial photograph 2007.jpg|thumb|Aerial view of Nagayama Kofun (2007)
{{Aerial Photography of National Land}}]] }} '''Nagayama Kofun''' ({{lang|ja|永山古墳}}) is a {{ill|Zenpokoenfun|ja|前方後円墳|1=Zenpokoenfun|12=draft}} located in {{ill|Higashi Nagayama-en|ja|東永山園|12=draft}}, {{ill|Sakai-ku|ja|堺区|12=draft}}, {{ill|Sakai|ja|堺市|12=draft}}, Osaka Prefecture, Japan. It is one of the tumuli that comprise the {{ill|Mozu Kofun Group|ja|百舌鳥古墳群|1=Mozu Tombs|12=draft}}, registered as part of the UNESCO World Historic Site Site {{ill|Mozu-Furuichi Kofun Group|ja|百舌鳥・古市古墳群 -古代日本の墳墓群-|12=draft}}. The tumulus is managed by the {{ill|Imperial Household Agency|ja|宮内庁|12=draft}} as an associated mound (陪冢) of {{ill|Daisen Kofun|ja|大仙陵古墳|1=Daisenryō Kofun|12=draft}}, Historic Site1 as "Mozu Mimihara Naka no Misasagi." Its moat is a Historic Site1 historic site by {{ill|Sakai|ja|堺市|12=draft}}. == Overview == The Nagayama Kofun lies approximately 50 meters northwest of {{ill|Daisen Kofun|ja|大仙陵古墳|1=Daisenryō Kofun|12=draft}}, oriented with its front portion facing south. The mound is 100 meters in total length, with a circular rear mound diameter of 63 meters and height of 10.3 meters, and a front mound width of 68.5 meters and height of 10.3 meters.{{Cite web|url=https://www.city.sakai.lg.jp/kanko/rekishi/dkofun/database/nagayama.html|title=Nagayama Kofun - World Historic Site Component|publisher=Sakai City Historic Site Division|accessdate=2021-pp-14}} The structure appears to be two-tiered, but its proportions suggest it may have been built in three tiers.{{Cite book|title=Mozu Kofun Cluster: Sakai's Historic Site|publisher=Sakai City Historic Site Division|year=2014}} A moat encircles the kofun, with an earthen bridge crossing its eastern section. However, whether this feature dates back to the tumulus' original construction remains unclear.{{Cite web|url=https://kunishitei.bunka.go.jp/bsys/maindetails/9pp/00000141|title=Nagayama Kofun - National Cultural Property Database|publisher=Agency for Cultural Affairs|accessdate=2021-pp-14}} Excavations have not been conducted, and details about the internal structure, burial goods, or Interred_individual remain unknown. The kofun is believed to have been constructed in the early 5th century. == area == The tumulus' area are as follows: * Total length: 100 meters * Rear circular mound diameter: 63 meters; height: 10.3 meters * Front mound width: 68.5 meters; height: 10.3 meters == Historic Site == === Sakai City Historic Site === * Designated as the "Moat of Nagayama Kofun" on April pp, 2016. == World Heritage Status == In {{ill|2019|ja|2019th year|12=draft}}, the Nagayama Kofun was registered as a component of the UNESCO World Historic Site Site {{ill|Mozu-Furuichi Kofun Group|ja|百舌鳥・古市古墳群|12=draft}}.{{Cite web|url=https://bunka.nii.ac.jp/special_content/hlinkJ|title=World Historic Site: Mozu-Furuichi Kofun Group|publisher=Agency for Cultural Affairs|accessdate=2021-pp-14}} == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{Cite book|title=Japanese Kofun Encyclopedia|publisher=Tokyo-do Publishing|year=1989|author=Matsumura Takafumi|pages=428}} * {{Cite book|title=Mozu Kofun Cluster: Sakai's Historic Site|publisher=Sakai City Historic Site Division|year=2014}} == External Links == * [https://www.city.sakai.lg.jp/kanko/rekishi/dkofun/database/nagayama.html Nagayama Kofun - World Historic Site Component] (Sakai City Historic Site Division) * [https://www.city.sakai.lg.jp/kanko/rekishi/sei/kohun_siru/mozukofungunrist-shousai.html Mozu Kofun Cluster Detailed List] (Sakai City World Heritage Division) {{draft categories| [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:pp error]] [[Category:pp to pp]] [[Category:Kofun in Osaka]] [[Category:History of Sakai-ku]] [[Category:Mozu Kofun Group]] [[Category:Zenpokoenfun]] [[Category:Imperial Tombs]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:pp]] [[Category:Nagayama Kofun]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:New2]] [[Category:aa]] [[Category:pages which might possibly be incomplete but are most likely complete]] [[Category:I think I cleared all the incomplete or blank pages earlier]] }} [[sn:Nagayama Kofun]] [[en:Nagayama Kofun]]

height: 10.3 meters == Historic Site == === Sakai City Historic Site === * Designated as the "Moat of Nagayama Kofun" on April pp, 2016. == World Heritage Status == In {{ill|2019|ja|2019th year|12=draft}}, the Nagayama Kofun was registered as a component of the UNESCO World Historic Site Site {{ill|Mozu-Furuichi Kofun Group|ja|百舌鳥・古市古墳群|12=draft}}.{{Cite web|url=https://bunka.nii.ac.jp/special_content/hlinkJ|title=World Historic Site: Mozu-Furuichi Kofun Group|publisher=Agency for Cultural Affairs|accessdate=2021-pp-14}} == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{Cite book|title=Japanese Kofun Encyclopedia|publisher=Tokyo-do Publishing|year=1989|author=Matsumura Takafumi|pages=428}} * {{Cite book|title=Mozu Kofun Cluster: Sakai's Historic Site|publisher=Sakai City Historic Site Division|year=2014}} == External Links == * [https://www.city.sakai.lg.jp/kanko/rekishi/dkofun/database/nagayama.html Nagayama Kofun - World Historic Site Component] (Sakai City Historic Site Division) * [https://www.city.sakai.lg.jp/kanko/rekishi/sei/kohun_siru/mozukofungunrist-shousai.html Mozu Kofun Cluster Detailed List] (Sakai City World Heritage Division) {{draft categories| [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:pp to pp]] [[Category:Kofun in Osaka]] [[Category:History of Sakai-ku]] [[Category:Mozu Kofun Group]] [[Category:Zenpokoenfun]] [[Category:Imperial Tombs]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:pp]] [[Category:Nagayama Kofun]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:aa]] [[Category:pages which might possibly be incomplete but are most likely complete]] [[Category:I think I cleared all the incomplete or blank pages earlier]] }} [[sn:Nagayama Kofun]] [[en:Nagayama Kofun]]

revision.comment: Removing from [[Category:Pages which might possibly be incomplete but are most likely complete]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "burial"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under [[:Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox ancient site|type = [[Zenpokoenfun]] |name = Nagayama Kofun |image = [[File:Nagayama Kofun (Sakai) zenkei.JPG|280px]]
View of the tumulus (foreground: front mound, background: rear circular mound) | part_of = {{ill|Mozu Kofun Group|ja|百舌鳥古墳群|1=Mozu Tombs|12=draft}} |location = {{ill|Higashi Nagayama-en|ja|東永山園|12=draft}}, {{ill|Sakai-ku|ja|堺区|12=draft}}, {{ill|Sakai|ja|堺市|12=draft}}, Osaka Prefecture, Japan |coordinates = {{Coord|34|34|6|N|135|29|13|E|region:JP-27_type:landmark|display=inline,title|name=Nagayama Kofun}} |type = Keyhole-shaped kofun |Construction = Estimated 5th century |area = Mound length: 100 m |Occupant = Unknown |Imperial Tomb = Designated as a "Mozu Mimihara Naka no Misasagi" (陪冢) by the Imperial Household Agency |Historic Site = Designated as a Sakai City Historic Site: "Moat of Nagayama Kofun" |burial goods = None reported |image 2 = [[File:Nagayama Tomb Aerial photograph 2007.jpg|thumb|Aerial view of Nagayama Kofun (2007)
{{Aerial Photography of National Land}}]] }} '''Nagayama Kofun''' ({{lang|ja|永山古墳}}) is a {{ill|Zenpokoenfun|ja|前方後円墳|1=Zenpokoenfun|12=draft}} located in {{ill|Higashi Nagayama-en|ja|東永山園|12=draft}}, {{ill|Sakai-ku|ja|堺区|12=draft}}, {{ill|Sakai|ja|堺市|12=draft}}, Osaka Prefecture, Japan. It is one of the tumuli that comprise the {{ill|Mozu Kofun Group|ja|百舌鳥古墳群|1=Mozu Tombs|12=draft}}, registered as part of the UNESCO World Historic Site Site {{ill|Mozu-Furuichi Kofun Group|ja|百舌鳥・古市古墳群 -古代日本の墳墓群-|12=draft}}. The tumulus is managed by the {{ill|Imperial Household Agency|ja|宮内庁|12=draft}} as an associated mound (陪冢) of {{ill|Daisen Kofun|ja|大仙陵古墳|1=Daisenryō Kofun|12=draft}}, Historic Site1 as "Mozu Mimihara Naka no Misasagi." Its moat is a Historic Site1 historic site by {{ill|Sakai|ja|堺市|12=draft}}. == Overview == The Nagayama Kofun lies approximately 50 meters northwest of {{ill|Daisen Kofun|ja|大仙陵古墳|1=Daisenryō Kofun|12=draft}}, oriented with its front portion facing south. The mound is 100 meters in total length, with a circular rear mound diameter of 63 meters and height of 10.3 meters, and a front mound width of 68.5 meters and height of 10.3 meters.{{Cite web|url=https://www.city.sakai.lg.jp/kanko/rekishi/dkofun/database/nagayama.html|title=Nagayama Kofun - World Historic Site Component|publisher=Sakai City Historic Site Division|accessdate=2021-pp-14}} The structure appears to be two-tiered, but its proportions suggest it may have been built in three tiers.{{Cite book|title=Mozu Kofun Cluster: Sakai's Historic Site|publisher=Sakai City Historic Site Division|year=2014}} A moat encircles the kofun, with an earthen bridge crossing its eastern section. However, whether this feature dates back to the tumulus' original construction remains unclear.{{Cite web|url=https://kunishitei.bunka.go.jp/bsys/maindetails/9pp/00000141|title=Nagayama Kofun - National Cultural Property Database|publisher=Agency for Cultural Affairs|accessdate=2021-pp-14}} Excavations have not been conducted, and details about the internal structure, burial goods, or Interred_individual remain unknown. The kofun is believed to have been constructed in the early 5th century. == area == The tumulus' area are as follows: * Total length: 100 meters * Rear circular mound diameter: 63 meters; height: 10.3 meters * Front mound width: 68.5 meters; height: 10.3 meters == Historic Site == === Sakai City Historic Site === * Designated as the "Moat of Nagayama Kofun" on April pp, 2016. == World Heritage Status == In {{ill|2019|ja|2019th year|12=draft}}, the Nagayama Kofun was registered as a component of the UNESCO World Historic Site Site {{ill|Mozu-Furuichi Kofun Group|ja|百舌鳥・古市古墳群|12=draft}}.{{Cite web|url=https://bunka.nii.ac.jp/special_content/hlinkJ|title=World Historic Site: Mozu-Furuichi Kofun Group|publisher=Agency for Cultural Affairs|accessdate=2021-pp-14}} == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{Cite book|title=Japanese Kofun Encyclopedia|publisher=Tokyo-do Publishing|year=1989|author=Matsumura Takafumi|pages=428}} * {{Cite book|title=Mozu Kofun Cluster: Sakai's Historic Site|publisher=Sakai City Historic Site Division|year=2014}} == External Links == * [https://www.city.sakai.lg.jp/kanko/rekishi/dkofun/database/nagayama.html Nagayama Kofun - World Historic Site Component] (Sakai City Historic Site Division) * [https://www.city.sakai.lg.jp/kanko/rekishi/sei/kohun_siru/mozukofungunrist-shousai.html Mozu Kofun Cluster Detailed List] (Sakai City World Heritage Division) {{draft categories| [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:pp to pp]] [[Category:Kofun in Osaka]] [[Category:History of Sakai-ku]] [[Category:Mozu Kofun Group]] [[Category:Zenpokoenfun]] [[Category:Imperial Tombs]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:pp]] [[Category:Nagayama Kofun]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:aa]] [[Category:I think I cleared all the incomplete or blank pages earlier]] }} [[sn:Nagayama Kofun]] [[en:Nagayama Kofun]]

{{Aerial Photography of National Land}}]] }} '''Nagayama Kofun''' ({{lang|ja|永山古墳}}) is a {{ill|Zenpokoenfun|ja|前方後円墳|1=Zenpokoenfun|12=draft}} located in {{ill|Higashi Nagayama-en|ja|東永山園|12=draft}}, {{ill|Sakai-ku|ja|堺区|12=draft}}, {{ill|Sakai|ja|堺市|12=draft}}, Osaka Prefecture, Japan. It is one of the tumuli that comprise the {{ill|Mozu Kofun Group|ja|百舌鳥古墳群|1=Mozu Tombs|12=draft}}, registered as part of the UNESCO World Historic Site Site {{ill|Mozu-Furuichi Kofun Group|ja|百舌鳥・古市古墳群 -古代日本の墳墓群-|12=draft}}. The tumulus is managed by the {{ill|Imperial Household Agency|ja|宮内庁|12=draft}} as an associated mound (陪冢) of {{ill|Daisen Kofun|ja|大仙陵古墳|1=Daisenryō Kofun|12=draft}}, Historic Site1 as "Mozu Mimihara Naka no Misasagi." Its moat is a Historic Site1 historic site by {{ill|Sakai|ja|堺市|12=draft}}. == Overview == The Nagayama Kofun lies approximately 50 meters northwest of {{ill|Daisen Kofun|ja|大仙陵古墳|1=Daisenryō Kofun|12=draft}}, oriented with its front portion facing south. The mound is 100 meters in total length, with a circular rear mound diameter of 63 meters and height of 10.3 meters, and a front mound width of 68.5 meters and height of 10.3 meters.{{Cite web|url=https://www.city.sakai.lg.jp/kanko/rekishi/dkofun/database/nagayama.html|title=Nagayama Kofun - World Historic Site Component|publisher=Sakai City Historic Site Division|accessdate=2021-pp-14}} The structure appears to be two-tiered, but its proportions suggest it may have been built in three tiers.{{Cite book|title=Mozu Kofun Cluster: Sakai's Historic Site|publisher=Sakai City Historic Site Division|year=2014}} A moat encircles the kofun, with an earthen bridge crossing its eastern section. However, whether this feature dates back to the tumulus' original construction remains unclear.{{Cite web|url=https://kunishitei.bunka.go.jp/bsys/maindetails/9pp/00000141|title=Nagayama Kofun - National Cultural Property Database|publisher=Agency for Cultural Affairs|accessdate=2021-pp-14}} Excavations have not been conducted, and details about the internal structure, burial goods, or Interred_individual remain unknown. The kofun is believed to have been constructed in the early 5th century. == area == The tumulus' area are as follows: * Total length: 100 meters * Rear circular mound diameter: 63 meters; height: 10.3 meters * Front mound width: 68.5 meters; height: 10.3 meters == Historic Site == === Sakai City Historic Site === * Designated as the "Moat of Nagayama Kofun" on April pp, 2016. == World Heritage Status == In {{ill|2019|ja|2019th year|12=draft}}, the Nagayama Kofun was registered as a component of the UNESCO World Historic Site Site {{ill|Mozu-Furuichi Kofun Group|ja|百舌鳥・古市古墳群|12=draft}}.{{Cite web|url=https://bunka.nii.ac.jp/special_content/hlinkJ|title=World Historic Site: Mozu-Furuichi Kofun Group|publisher=Agency for Cultural Affairs|accessdate=2021-pp-14}} == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{Cite book|title=Japanese Kofun Encyclopedia|publisher=Tokyo-do Publishing|year=1989|author=Matsumura Takafumi|pages=428}} * {{Cite book|title=Mozu Kofun Cluster: Sakai's Historic Site|publisher=Sakai City Historic Site Division|year=2014}} == External Links == * [https://www.city.sakai.lg.jp/kanko/rekishi/dkofun/database/nagayama.html Nagayama Kofun - World Historic Site Component] (Sakai City Historic Site Division) * [https://www.city.sakai.lg.jp/kanko/rekishi/sei/kohun_siru/mozukofungunrist-shousai.html Mozu Kofun Cluster Detailed List] (Sakai City World Heritage Division) {{draft categories| [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:pp to pp]] [[Category:Kofun in Osaka]] [[Category:History of Sakai-ku]] [[Category:Mozu Kofun Group]] [[Category:Zenpokoenfun]] [[Category:Imperial Tombs]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:pp]] [[Category:Nagayama Kofun]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] }} [[sn:Nagayama Kofun]] [[en:Nagayama Kofun]]

The kofun is believed to have been constructed in the early 5th century. == area == The tumulus' area are as follows: * Total length: 100 meters * Rear circular mound diameter: 63 meters; height: 10.3 meters * Front mound width: 68.5 meters; height: 10.3 meters == Historic Site == === Sakai City Historic Site === * Designated as the "Moat of Nagayama Kofun" on April pp, 2016. == World Heritage Status == In {{ill|2019|ja|2019th year|12=draft|12=draft}}, the Nagayama Kofun was registered as a component of the UNESCO World Historic Site Site {{ill|Mozu-Furuichi Kofun Group|ja|百舌鳥・古市古墳群|12=draft|12=draft}}.{{Cite web|url=https://bunka.nii.ac.jp/special_content/hlinkJ|title=World Historic Site: Mozu-Furuichi Kofun Group|publisher=Agency for Cultural Affairs|accessdate=2021-pp-14}} == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{Cite book|title=Japanese Kofun Encyclopedia|publisher=Tokyo-do Publishing|year=1989|author=Matsumura Takafumi|pages=428}} * {{Cite book|title=Mozu Kofun Cluster: Sakai's Historic Site|publisher=Sakai City Historic Site Division|year=2014}} == External Links == * [https://www.city.sakai.lg.jp/kanko/rekishi/dkofun/database/nagayama.html Nagayama Kofun - World Historic Site Component] (Sakai City Historic Site Division) * [https://www.city.sakai.lg.jp/kanko/rekishi/sei/kohun_siru/mozukofungunrist-shousai.html Mozu Kofun Cluster Detailed List] (Sakai City World Heritage Division) {{draft categories| }} {{draft categories| [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:pp to pp]] [[Category:Kofun in Osaka]] [[Category:History of Sakai-ku]] [[Category:Mozu Kofun Group]] [[Category:Zenpokoenfun]] [[Category:Mausoleums]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:pp]] [[Category:Nagayama Kofun]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] }} [[sn:Nagayama Kofun]] [[en:Nagayama Kofun]]

revision.comment: Copying from [[Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] to [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "burial"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under [[:Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox ancient site|type = [[Zenpokoenfun]] |name = Nagayama Kofun |image = [[File:Nagayama Kofun (Sakai) zenkei.JPG|280px]]
View of the tumulus (foreground: front mound, background: rear circular mound) | part_of = {{ill|Mozu Kofun Group|ja|百舌鳥古墳群|1=Mozu Tombs|12=draft|12=draft}} |location = {{ill|Higashi Nagayama-en|ja|東永山園|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Sakai-ku|ja|堺区|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Sakai|ja|堺市|12=draft|12=draft}}, Osaka Prefecture, Japan |coordinates = {{Coord|34|34|6|N|135|29|13|E|region:JP-27_type:landmark|display=inline,title|name=Nagayama Kofun}} |type = Keyhole-shaped kofun |built = Estimated 5th century |area = Mound length: 100 m |Occupant = Unknown |Mausoleum = Designated as a "Mozu Mimihara Naka no Misasagi" (陪冢) by the Imperial Household Agency |Historic Site = Designated as a Sakai City Historic Site: "Moat of Nagayama Kofun" |burial goods = None reported |image 2 = [[File:Nagayama Tomb Aerial photograph 2007.jpg|thumb|Aerial view of Nagayama Kofun (2007)
{{Aerial Photography of National Land}}]] }} '''Nagayama Kofun''' ({{lang|ja|永山古墳}}) is a {{ill|Zenpokoenfun|ja|前方後円墳|1=Zenpokoenfun|12=draft|12=draft}} located in {{ill|Higashi Nagayama-en|ja|東永山園|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Sakai-ku|ja|堺区|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Sakai|ja|堺市|12=draft|12=draft}}, Osaka Prefecture, Japan. It is one of the tumuli that comprise the {{ill|Mozu Kofun Group|ja|百舌鳥古墳群|1=Mozu Tombs|12=draft|12=draft}}, registered as part of the UNESCO World Historic Site Site {{ill|Mozu-Furuichi Kofun Group|ja|百舌鳥・古市古墳群 -古代日本の墳墓群-|12=draft|12=draft}}. The tumulus is managed by the {{ill|Imperial Household Agency|ja|宮内庁|12=draft|12=draft}} as an associated mound (陪冢) of {{ill|Daisen Kofun|ja|大仙陵古墳|1=Daisenryō Kofun|12=draft|12=draft}}, Historic Site1 as "Mozu Mimihara Naka no Misasagi." Its moat is a Historic Site1 historic site by {{ill|Sakai|ja|堺市|12=draft|12=draft}}. == Overview == The Nagayama Kofun lies approximately 50 meters northwest of {{ill|Daisen Kofun|ja|大仙陵古墳|1=Daisenryō Kofun|12=draft|12=draft}}, oriented with its front portion facing south. The mound is 100 meters in total length, with a circular rear mound diameter of 63 meters and height of 10.3 meters, and a front mound width of 68.5 meters and height of 10.3 meters.{{Cite web|url=https://www.city.sakai.lg.jp/kanko/rekishi/dkofun/database/nagayama.html|title=Nagayama Kofun - World Historic Site Component|publisher=Sakai City Historic Site Division|accessdate=2021-pp-14}} The structure appears to be two-tiered, but its proportions suggest it may have been built in three tiers.{{Cite book|title=Mozu Kofun Cluster: Sakai's Historic Site|publisher=Sakai City Historic Site Division|year=2014}} A moat encircles the kofun, with an earthen bridge crossing its eastern section. However, whether this feature dates back to the tumulus' original construction remains unclear.{{Cite web|url=https://kunishitei.bunka.go.jp/bsys/maindetails/9pp/00000141|title=Nagayama Kofun - National Cultural Property Database|publisher=Agency for Cultural Affairs|accessdate=2021-pp-14}} Excavations have not been conducted, and details about the internal structure, burial goods, or Interred_individual remain unknown. The kofun is believed to have been constructed in the early 5th century. == area == The tumulus' area are as follows: * Total length: 100 meters * Rear circular mound diameter: 63 meters; height: 10.3 meters * Front mound width: 68.5 meters; height: 10.3 meters == Historic Site == === Sakai City Historic Site === * Designated as the "Moat of Nagayama Kofun" on April pp, 2016. == World Heritage Status == In {{ill|2019|ja|2019th year|12=draft|12=draft}}, the Nagayama Kofun was registered as a component of the UNESCO World Historic Site Site {{ill|Mozu-Furuichi Kofun Group|ja|百舌鳥・古市古墳群|12=draft|12=draft}}.{{Cite web|url=https://bunka.nii.ac.jp/special_content/hlinkJ|title=World Historic Site: Mozu-Furuichi Kofun Group|publisher=Agency for Cultural Affairs|accessdate=2021-pp-14}} == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{Cite book|title=Japanese Kofun Encyclopedia|publisher=Tokyo-do Publishing|year=1989|author=Matsumura Takafumi|pages=428}} * {{Cite book|title=Mozu Kofun Cluster: Sakai's Historic Site|publisher=Sakai City Historic Site Division|year=2014}} == External Links == * [https://www.city.sakai.lg.jp/kanko/rekishi/dkofun/database/nagayama.html Nagayama Kofun - World Historic Site Component] (Sakai City Historic Site Division) * [https://www.city.sakai.lg.jp/kanko/rekishi/sei/kohun_siru/mozukofungunrist-shousai.html Mozu Kofun Cluster Detailed List] (Sakai City World Heritage Division) {{draft categories| }} {{draft categories| [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:pp to pp]] [[Category:Kofun in Osaka]] [[Category:History of Sakai-ku]] [[Category:Mozu Kofun Group]] [[Category:Zenpokoenfun]] [[Category:Mausoleums]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:pp]] [[Category:Nagayama Kofun]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Nagayama Kofun]][[Category:qq]] }} [[sn:Nagayama Kofun]] [[en:Nagayama Kofun]]

So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under [[:Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox ancient site|type = [[Zenpokoenfun]] |name = Nagayama Kofun |image = [[File:Nagayama Kofun (Sakai) zenkei.JPG|280px]]
View of the tumulus (foreground: front mound, background: rear circular mound) | part_of = {{ill|Mozu Kofun Group|ja|百舌鳥古墳群|1=Mozu Tombs|12=draft|12=draft}} |location = {{ill|Higashi Nagayama-en|ja|東永山園|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Sakai-ku|ja|堺区|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Sakai|ja|堺市|12=draft|12=draft}}, Osaka Prefecture, Japan |coordinates = {{Coord|34|34|6|N|135|29|13|E|region:JP-27_type:landmark|display=inline,title|name=Nagayama Kofun}} |type = Keyhole-shaped kofun |built = Estimated 5th century |area = Mound length: 100 m |Occupant = Unknown |Mausoleum = Designated as a "Mozu Mimihara Naka no Misasagi" (陪冢) by the Imperial Household Agency |Historic Site = Designated as a Sakai City Historic Site: "Moat of Nagayama Kofun" |burial goods = None reported |image 2 = [[File:Nagayama Tomb Aerial photograph 2007.jpg|thumb|Aerial view of Nagayama Kofun (2007)
{{Aerial Photography of National Land}}]] }} '''Nagayama Kofun''' ({{lang|ja|永山古墳}}) is a {{ill|Zenpokoenfun|ja|前方後円墳|1=Zenpokoenfun|1=Zenpokoenfun|12=draft|12=draft}} located in {{ill|Higashi Nagayama-en|ja|東永山園|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Sakai-ku|ja|堺区|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Sakai|ja|堺市|12=draft|12=draft}}, Osaka Prefecture, Japan. It is one of the tumuli that comprise the {{ill|Mozu Kofun Group|ja|百舌鳥古墳群|1=Mozu Tombs|12=draft|12=draft}}, registered as part of the UNESCO World Historic Site Site {{ill|Mozu-Furuichi Kofun Group|ja|百舌鳥・古市古墳群 -古代日本の墳墓群-|12=draft|12=draft}}. The tumulus is managed by the {{ill|Imperial Household Agency|ja|宮内庁|12=draft|12=draft}} as an associated mound (陪冢) of {{ill|Daisen Kofun|ja|大仙陵古墳|1=Daisenryō Kofun|12=draft|12=draft}}, Historic Site1 as "Mozu Mimihara Naka no Misasagi." Its moat is a Historic Site1 historic site by {{ill|Sakai|ja|堺市|12=draft|12=draft}}. == Overview == The Nagayama Kofun lies approximately 50 meters northwest of {{ill|Daisen Kofun|ja|大仙陵古墳|1=Daisenryō Kofun|12=draft|12=draft}}, oriented with its front portion facing south. The mound is 100 meters in total length, with a circular rear mound diameter of 63 meters and height of 10.3 meters, and a front mound width of 68.5 meters and height of 10.3 meters.{{Cite web|url=https://www.city.sakai.lg.jp/kanko/rekishi/dkofun/database/nagayama.html|title=Nagayama Kofun - World Historic Site Component|publisher=Sakai City Historic Site Division|accessdate=2021-pp-14}} The structure appears to be two-tiered, but its proportions suggest it may have been built in three tiers.{{Cite book|title=Mozu Kofun Cluster: Sakai's Historic Site|publisher=Sakai City Historic Site Division|year=2014}} A moat encircles the kofun, with an earthen bridge crossing its eastern section. However, whether this feature dates back to the tumulus' original construction remains unclear.{{Cite web|url=https://kunishitei.bunka.go.jp/bsys/maindetails/9pp/00000141|title=Nagayama Kofun - National Cultural Property Database|publisher=Agency for Cultural Affairs|accessdate=2021-pp-14}} Excavations have not been conducted, and details about the internal structure, burial goods, or Interred_individual remain unknown. The kofun is believed to have been constructed in the early 5th century. == area == The tumulus' area are as follows: * Total length: 100 meters * Rear circular mound diameter: 63 meters; height: 10.3 meters * Front mound width: 68.5 meters; height: 10.3 meters == Historic Site == === Sakai City Historic Site === * Designated as the "Moat of Nagayama Kofun" on April pp, 2016. == World Heritage Status == In {{ill|2019|ja|2019th year|12=draft|12=draft}}, the Nagayama Kofun was registered as a component of the UNESCO World Historic Site Site {{ill|Mozu-Furuichi Kofun Group|ja|百舌鳥・古市古墳群|12=draft|12=draft}}.{{Cite web|url=https://bunka.nii.ac.jp/special_content/hlinkJ|title=World Historic Site: Mozu-Furuichi Kofun Group|publisher=Agency for Cultural Affairs|accessdate=2021-pp-14}} == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{Cite book|title=Japanese Kofun Encyclopedia|publisher=Tokyo-do Publishing|year=1989|author=Matsumura Takafumi|pages=428}} * {{Cite book|title=Mozu Kofun Cluster: Sakai's Historic Site|publisher=Sakai City Historic Site Division|year=2014}} == External Links == * [https://www.city.sakai.lg.jp/kanko/rekishi/dkofun/database/nagayama.html Nagayama Kofun - World Historic Site Component] (Sakai City Historic Site Division) * [https://www.city.sakai.lg.jp/kanko/rekishi/sei/kohun_siru/mozukofungunrist-shousai.html Mozu Kofun Cluster Detailed List] (Sakai City World Heritage Division) {{draft categories| }} {{draft categories| [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:pp to pp]] [[Category:Kofun in Osaka]] [[Category:History of Sakai-ku]] [[Category:Mozu Kofun Group]] [[Category:Zenpokoenfun]] [[Category:Mausoleums]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:pp]] [[Category:Nagayama Kofun]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Nagayama Kofun]][[Category:qq]] }} [[sn:Nagayama Kofun]] [[en:Nagayama Kofun]]

View of the tumulus (foreground: front mound, background: rear circular mound) | part_of = {{ill|Mozu Kofun Group|ja|百舌鳥古墳群|1=Mozu Tombs|12=draft|12=draft}} |location = {{ill|Higashi Nagayama-en|ja|東永山園|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Sakai-ku|ja|堺区|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Sakai|ja|堺市|12=draft|12=draft}}, Osaka Prefecture, Japan |coordinates = {{Coord|34|34|6|N|135|29|13|E|region:JP-27_type:landmark|display=inline,title|name=Nagayama Kofun}} |type = Keyhole-shaped kofun |built = Estimated 5th century |area = Mound length: 100 m |Occupant = Unknown |Mausoleum = Designated as a "Mozu Mimihara Naka no Misasagi" (陪冢) by the Imperial Household Agency |Historic Site = Designated as a Sakai City Historic Site: "Moat of Nagayama Kofun" |burial goods = None reported |image 2 = [[File:Nagayama Tomb Aerial photograph 2007.jpg|thumb|Aerial view of Nagayama Kofun (2007)
{{Aerial Photography of National Land}}]] }} '''Nagayama Kofun''' ({{lang|ja|永山古墳}}) is a {{ill|Zenpokoenfun|ja|前方後円墳|1=Zenpokoenfun|1=Zenpokoenfun|12=draft|12=draft}} located in {{ill|Higashi Nagayama-en|ja|東永山園|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Sakai-ku|ja|堺区|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Sakai|ja|堺市|12=draft|12=draft}}, Osaka Prefecture, Japan. It is one of the tumuli that comprise the {{ill|Mozu Kofun Group|ja|百舌鳥古墳群|1=Mozu Tombs|12=draft|12=draft}}, registered as part of the UNESCO World Historic Site Site {{ill|Mozu-Furuichi Kofun Group|ja|百舌鳥・古市古墳群 -古代日本の墳墓群-|12=draft|12=draft}}. The tumulus is managed by the {{ill|Imperial Household Agency|ja|宮内庁|12=draft|12=draft}} as an associated mound (陪冢) of {{ill|Daisen Kofun|ja|大仙陵古墳|1=Daisenryō Kofun|12=draft|12=draft}}, Historic Site1 as "Mozu Mimihara Naka no Misasagi." Its moat is a Historic Site1 historic site by {{ill|Sakai|ja|堺市|12=draft|12=draft}}. == Overview == The Nagayama Kofun lies approximately 50 meters northwest of {{ill|Daisen Kofun|ja|大仙陵古墳|1=Daisenryō Kofun|12=draft|12=draft}}, oriented with its front portion facing south. The mound is 100 meters in total length, with a circular rear mound diameter of 63 meters and height of 10.3 meters, and a front mound width of 68.5 meters and height of 10.3 meters.{{Cite web|url=https://www.city.sakai.lg.jp/kanko/rekishi/dkofun/database/nagayama.html|title=Nagayama Kofun - World Historic Site Component|publisher=Sakai City Historic Site Division|accessdate=2021-pp-14}} The structure appears to be two-tiered, but its proportions suggest it may have been built in three tiers.{{Cite book|title=Mozu Kofun Cluster: Sakai's Historic Site|publisher=Sakai City Historic Site Division|year=2014}} A moat encircles the kofun, with an earthen bridge crossing its eastern section. However, whether this feature dates back to the tumulus' original construction remains unclear.{{Cite web|url=https://kunishitei.bunka.go.jp/bsys/maindetails/9pp/00000141|title=Nagayama Kofun - National Cultural Property Database|publisher=Agency for Cultural Affairs|accessdate=2021-pp-14}} Excavations have not been conducted, and details about the internal structure, burial goods, or Interred_individual remain unknown. The kofun is believed to have been constructed in the early 5th century. == area == The tumulus' area are as follows: * Total length: 100 meters * Rear circular mound diameter: 63 meters; height: 10.3 meters * Front mound width: 68.5 meters; height: 10.3 meters == Historic Site == === Sakai City Historic Site === * Designated as the "Moat of Nagayama Kofun" on April pp, 2016. == World Heritage Status == In {{ill|2019|ja|2019th year|12=draft|12=draft}}, the Nagayama Kofun was registered as a component of the UNESCO World Historic Site Site {{ill|Mozu-Furuichi Kofun Group|ja|百舌鳥・古市古墳群|12=draft|12=draft}}.{{Cite web|url=https://bunka.nii.ac.jp/special_content/hlinkJ|title=World Historic Site: Mozu-Furuichi Kofun Group|publisher=Agency for Cultural Affairs|accessdate=2021-pp-14}} == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{Cite book|title=Japanese Kofun Encyclopedia|publisher=Tokyo-do Publishing|year=1989|author=Matsumura Takafumi|pages=428}} * {{Cite book|title=Mozu Kofun Cluster: Sakai's Historic Site|publisher=Sakai City Historic Site Division|year=2014}} == External Links == * [https://www.city.sakai.lg.jp/kanko/rekishi/dkofun/database/nagayama.html Nagayama Kofun - World Historic Site Component] (Sakai City Historic Site Division) * [https://www.city.sakai.lg.jp/kanko/rekishi/sei/kohun_siru/mozukofungunrist-shousai.html Mozu Kofun Cluster Detailed List] (Sakai City World Heritage Division) {{draft categories| }} {{draft categories| [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:pp to pp]] [[Category:Kofun in Osaka]] [[Category:History of Sakai-ku]] [[Category:Mozu Kofun Group]] [[Category:Zenpokoenfun]] [[Category:Mausoleums]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:pp]] [[Category:Nagayama Kofun]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Nagayama Kofun]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Nagayama Kofun]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Nagayama Kofun]][[Category:qq]] }} [[sn:Nagayama Kofun]] [[en:Nagayama Kofun]]

{{Aerial Photography of National Land}}]] }} '''Nagayama Kofun''' ({{lang|ja|永山古墳}}) is a {{ill|Zenpokoenfun|ja|前方後円墳|1=Zenpokoenfun|1=Zenpokoenfun}} located in {{ill|Higashi Nagayama-en|ja|東永山園}}, {{ill|Sakai-ku|ja|堺区}}, {{ill|Sakai|ja|堺市}}, Osaka Prefecture, Japan. It is one of the tumuli that comprise the {{ill|Mozu Kofun Group|ja|百舌鳥古墳群|1=Mozu Tombs}}, registered as part of the UNESCO World Historic Site Site {{ill|Mozu-Furuichi Kofun Group|ja|百舌鳥・古市古墳群 -古代日本の墳墓群-}}. The tumulus is managed by the {{ill|Imperial Household Agency|ja|宮内庁}} as an associated mound (陪冢) of {{ill|Daisen Kofun|ja|大仙陵古墳|1=Daisenryō Kofun}}, Historic Site1 as "Mozu Mimihara Naka no Misasagi." However, whether this feature dates back to the tumulus' original construction remains unclear.{{Cite web|url=https://kunishitei.bunka.go.jp/bsys/maindetails/9pp/00000141|title=Nagayama Kofun - National Cultural Property Database|publisher=Agency for Cultural Affairs|accessdate=2021-pp-14}} Excavations have not been conducted, and details about the internal structure, burial goods, or Interred_individual remain unknown. The kofun is believed to have been constructed in the early 5th century. == area == The tumulus' area are as follows: * Total length: 100 meters * Rear circular mound diameter: 63 meters; height: 10.3 meters * Front mound width: 68.5 meters; It is one of the tumuli that comprise the {{ill|Mozu Kofun Group|ja|百舌鳥古墳群|1=Mozu Tombs}}, registered as part of the UNESCO World Historic Site Site {{ill|Mozu-Furuichi Kofun Group|ja|百舌鳥・古市古墳群 -古代日本の墳墓群-}}. The tumulus is managed by the {{ill|Imperial Household Agency|ja|宮内庁}} as an associated mound (陪冢) of {{ill|Daisen Kofun|ja|大仙陵古墳|1=Daisenryō Kofun}}, Historic Site1 as "Mozu Mimihara Naka no Misasagi." Its moat is a Historic Site1 historic site by {{ill|Sakai|ja|堺市}}. == Overview == The Nagayama Kofun lies approximately 50 meters northwest of {{ill|Daisen Kofun|ja|大仙陵古墳|1=Daisenryō Kofun}}, oriented with its front portion facing south. The mound is 100 meters in total length, with a circular rear mound diameter of 63 meters and height of 10.3 meters, and a front mound width of 68.5 meters and height of 10.3 meters.{{Cite web|url=https://www.city.sakai.lg.jp/kanko/rekishi/dkofun/database/nagayama.html|title=Nagayama Kofun - World Historic Site Component|publisher=Sakai City Historic Site Division|accessdate=2021-pp-14}} The structure appears to be two-tiered, but its proportions suggest it may have been built in three tiers.{{Cite book|title=Mozu Kofun Cluster: Sakai's Historic Site|publisher=Sakai City Historic Site Division|year=2014}} A moat encircles the kofun, with an earthen bridge crossing its eastern section. However, whether this feature dates back to the tumulus' original construction remains unclear.{{Cite web|url=https://kunishitei.bunka.go.jp/bsys/maindetails/9pp/00000141|title=Nagayama Kofun - National Cultural Property Database|publisher=Agency for Cultural Affairs|accessdate=2021-pp-14}} Excavations have not been conducted, and details about the internal structure, burial goods, or Interred_individual remain unknown. The kofun is believed to have been constructed in the early 5th century. == area == The tumulus' area are as follows: * Total length: 100 meters * Rear circular mound diameter: 63 meters; height: 10.3 meters * Front mound width: 68.5 meters; height: 10.3 meters == Historic Site == === Sakai City Historic Site === * Designated as the "Moat of Nagayama Kofun" on April pp, 2016. == World Heritage Status == In {{ill|2019|ja|2019th year}}, the Nagayama Kofun was registered as a component of the UNESCO World Historic Site Site {{ill|Mozu-Furuichi Kofun Group|ja|百舌鳥・古市古墳群}}.{{Cite web|url=https://bunka.nii.ac.jp/special_content/hlinkJ|title=World Historic Site: Mozu-Furuichi Kofun Group|publisher=Agency for Cultural Affairs|accessdate=2021-pp-14}} == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{Cite book|title=Japanese Kofun Encyclopedia|publisher=Tokyo-do Publishing|year=1989|author=Matsumura Takafumi|pages=428}} * {{Cite book|title=Mozu Kofun Cluster: Sakai's Historic Site|publisher=Sakai City Historic Site Division|year=2014}} == External Links == * [https://www.city.sakai.lg.jp/kanko/rekishi/dkofun/database/nagayama.html Nagayama Kofun - World Historic Site Component] (Sakai City Historic Site Division) * [https://www.city.sakai.lg.jp/kanko/rekishi/sei/kohun_siru/mozukofungunrist-shousai.html Mozu Kofun Cluster Detailed List] (Sakai City World Heritage Division) {{draft categories| }} {{draft categories| [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:pp to pp]] [[Category:Kofun in Osaka]] [[Category:History of Sakai-ku]] [[Category:Mozu Kofun Group]] [[Category:Zenpokoenfun]] [[Category:Mausoleums]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:pp]] [[Category:Nagayama Kofun]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Nagayama Kofun]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Nagayama Kofun]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Nagayama Kofun]][[Category:qq]] }} [[sn:Nagayama Kofun]] [[en:Nagayama Kofun]]

{{afc comment|1=See [[Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] as this is a member[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:44, 22 April 2025 (UTC)}} [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] {{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "burial"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under [[Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox ancient site|type = [[Zenpokoenfun]] |name = Nagayama Kofun |image = [[File:Nagayama Kofun (Sakai) zenkei.JPG|280px]]

{{Aerial Photography of National Land}}]] }} '''Nagayama Kofun''' ({{lang|ja|永山古墳}}) is a {{ill|Zenpokoenfun|ja|前方後円墳|1=Zenpokoenfun|1=Zenpokoenfun}} located in {{ill|Higashi Nagayama-en|ja|東永山園}}, {{ill|Sakai-ku|ja|堺区}}, {{ill|Sakai|ja|堺市}}, Osaka Prefecture, Japan. It is one of the tumuli that comprise the {{ill|Mozu Kofun Group|ja|百舌鳥古墳群|1=Mozu Tombs}}, registered as part of the UNESCO World Historic Site Site {{ill|Mozu-Furuichi Kofun Group|ja|百舌鳥・古市古墳群 -古代日本の墳墓群-}}. The tumulus is managed by the {{ill|Imperial Household Agency|ja|宮内庁}} as an associated mound (陪冢) of {{ill|Daisen Kofun|ja|大仙陵古墳|1=Daisenryō Kofun}}, Historic Site1 as "Mozu Mimihara Naka no Misasagi." Its moat is a Historic Site1 historic site by {{ill|Sakai|ja|堺市}}. == Overview == The Nagayama Kofun lies approximately 50 meters northwest of {{ill|Daisen Kofun|ja|大仙陵古墳|1=Daisenryō Kofun}}, oriented with its front portion facing south. However, whether this feature dates back to the tumulus' original construction remains unclear.{{Cite web|url=https://kunishitei.bunka.go.jp/bsys/maindetails/9pp/00000141|title=Nagayama Kofun - National Cultural Property Database|publisher=Agency for Cultural Affairs|accessdate=2021-pp-14}} Excavations have not been conducted, and details about the internal structure, burial goods, or Interred_individual remain unknown. The kofun is believed to have been constructed in the early 5th century. == area == The tumulus' area are as follows: * Total length: 100 meters * Rear circular mound diameter: 63 meters; height: 10.3 meters * Front mound width: 68.5 meters; height: 10.3 meters == Historic Site == === Sakai City Historic Site === * Designated as the "Moat of Nagayama Kofun" on April pp, 2016. == World Heritage Status == In {{ill|2019|ja|2019th year}}, the Nagayama Kofun was registered as a component of the UNESCO World Historic Site Site {{ill|Mozu-Furuichi Kofun Group|ja|百舌鳥・古市古墳群}}.{{Cite web|url=https://bunka.nii.ac.jp/special_content/hlinkJ|title=World Historic Site: Mozu-Furuichi Kofun Group|publisher=Agency for Cultural Affairs|accessdate=2021-pp-14}} == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{Cite book|title=Japanese Kofun Encyclopedia|publisher=Tokyo-do Publishing|year=1989|author=Matsumura Takafumi|pages=428}} * {{Cite book|title=Mozu Kofun Cluster: Sakai's Historic Site|publisher=Sakai City Historic Site Division|year=2014}} == External Links == * [https://www.city.sakai.lg.jp/kanko/rekishi/dkofun/database/nagayama.html Nagayama Kofun - World Historic Site Component] (Sakai City Historic Site Division) * [https://www.city.sakai.lg.jp/kanko/rekishi/sei/kohun_siru/mozukofungunrist-shousai.html Mozu Kofun Cluster Detailed List] (Sakai City World Heritage Division) {{draft categories| }} {{draft categories| [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:Kofun in Osaka]] [[Category:History of Sakai-ku]] [[Category:Mozu Kofun Group]] [[Category:Zenpokoenfun]] [[Category:Mausoleums]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:pp]] [[Category:Nagayama Kofun]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Nagayama Kofun]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Nagayama Kofun]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Nagayama Kofun]][[Category:qq]] }} [[sn:Nagayama Kofun]] [[en:Nagayama Kofun]]

The mound is 100 meters in total length, with a circular rear mound diameter of 63 meters and height of 10.3 meters, and a front mound width of 68.5 meters and height of 10.3 meters.{{Cite web|url=https://www.city.sakai.lg.jp/kanko/rekishi/dkofun/database/nagayama.html|title=Nagayama Kofun - World Historic Site Component|publisher=Sakai City Historic Site Division|accessdate=2021-pp-14}} The structure appears to be two-tiered, but its proportions suggest it may have been built in three tiers.{{Cite book|title=Mozu Kofun Cluster: Sakai's Historic Site|publisher=Sakai City Historic Site Division|year=2014}} A moat encircles the kofun, with an earthen bridge crossing its eastern section. However, whether this feature dates back to the tumulus' original construction remains unclear.{{Cite web|url=https://kunishitei.bunka.go.jp/bsys/maindetails/9pp/00000141|title=Nagayama Kofun - National Cultural Property Database|publisher=Agency for Cultural Affairs|accessdate=2021-pp-14}} Excavations have not been conducted, and details about the internal structure, burial goods, or Interred_individual remain unknown. The kofun is believed to have been constructed in the early 5th century. == area == The tumulus' area are as follows: * Total length: 100 meters * Rear circular mound diameter: 63 meters; height: 10.3 meters * Front mound width: 68.5 meters; height: 10.3 meters == Historic Site == === Sakai City Historic Site === * Designated as the "Moat of Nagayama Kofun" on April pp, 2016. == World Heritage Status == In {{ill|2019|ja|2019th year|12=draft}}, the Nagayama Kofun was registered as a component of the UNESCO World Historic Site Site {{ill|Mozu-Furuichi Kofun Group|ja|百舌鳥・古市古墳群|12=draft}}.{{Cite web|url=https://bunka.nii.ac.jp/special_content/hlinkJ|title=World Historic Site: Mozu-Furuichi Kofun Group|publisher=Agency for Cultural Affairs|accessdate=2021-pp-14}} == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{Cite book|title=Japanese Kofun Encyclopedia|publisher=Tokyo-do Publishing|year=1989|author=Matsumura Takafumi|pages=428}} * {{Cite book|title=Mozu Kofun Cluster: Sakai's Historic Site|publisher=Sakai City Historic Site Division|year=2014}} == External Links == * [https://www.city.sakai.lg.jp/kanko/rekishi/dkofun/database/nagayama.html Nagayama Kofun - World Historic Site Component] (Sakai City Historic Site Division) * [https://www.city.sakai.lg.jp/kanko/rekishi/sei/kohun_siru/mozukofungunrist-shousai.html Mozu Kofun Cluster Detailed List] (Sakai City World Heritage Division) {{draft categories| }} {{draft categories| }} {{draft categories| [[Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:pp to pp]] [[Category:Kofun in Osaka]] [[Category:History of Sakai-ku]] [[Category:Mozu Kofun Group]] [[Category:Zenpokoenfun]] [[Category:Mausoleums]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:Nagayama Kofun]] }} [[sn:Nagayama Kofun]] [[en:Nagayama Kofun]]

revision.comment: Bot: cleanup/reformat
revision.text:
{{afc comment|1=See as this is a member[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:44, 22 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "burial"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox ancient site|type = [[Zenpokoenfun]] |name = Nagayama Kofun |image = [[File:Nagayama Kofun (Sakai) zenkei.JPG|280px]]
View of the tumulus (foreground: front mound, background: rear circular mound) | part_of = {{ill|Mozu Kofun Group|ja|百舌鳥古墳群|1=Mozu Tombs|12=draft}} |location = {{ill|Higashi Nagayama-en|ja|東永山園|12=draft}}, {{ill|Sakai-ku|ja|堺区|12=draft}}, {{ill|Sakai|ja|堺市|12=draft}}, Osaka Prefecture, Japan |coordinates = {{Coord|34|34|6|N|135|29|13|E|region:JP-27_type:landmark|display=inline,title|name=Nagayama Kofun}} |type = Keyhole-shaped kofun |built = Estimated 5th century |area = Mound length: 100 m |Occupant = Unknown |Mausoleum = Designated as a "Mozu Mimihara Naka no Misasagi" (陪冢) by the Imperial Household Agency |Historic Site = Designated as a Sakai City Historic Site: "Moat of Nagayama Kofun" |burial goods = None reported |image 2 = [[File:Nagayama Tomb Aerial photograph 2007.jpg|thumb|Aerial view of Nagayama Kofun (2007)
{{Aerial Photography of National Land}}]] }} '''Nagayama Kofun''' ({{lang|ja|永山古墳}}) is a {{ill|Zenpokoenfun|ja|前方後円墳|1=Zenpokoenfun|1=Zenpokoenfun|12=draft}} located in {{ill|Higashi Nagayama-en|ja|東永山園|12=draft}}, {{ill|Sakai-ku|ja|堺区|12=draft}}, {{ill|Sakai|ja|堺市|12=draft}}, Osaka Prefecture, Japan. It is one of the tumuli that comprise the {{ill|Mozu Kofun Group|ja|百舌鳥古墳群|1=Mozu Tombs|12=draft}}, registered as part of the UNESCO World Historic Site Site {{ill|Mozu-Furuichi Kofun Group|ja|百舌鳥・古市古墳群 -古代日本の墳墓群-|12=draft}}. The tumulus is managed by the {{ill|Imperial Household Agency|ja|宮内庁|12=draft}} as an associated mound (陪冢) of {{ill|Daisen Kofun|ja|大仙陵古墳|1=Daisenryō Kofun|12=draft}}, Historic Site1 as "Mozu Mimihara Naka no Misasagi." Its moat is a Historic Site1 historic site by {{ill|Sakai|ja|堺市|12=draft}}. == Overview == The Nagayama Kofun lies approximately 50 meters northwest of {{ill|Daisen Kofun|ja|大仙陵古墳|1=Daisenryō Kofun|12=draft}}, oriented with its front portion facing south. The mound is 100 meters in total length, with a circular rear mound diameter of 63 meters and height of 10.3 meters, and a front mound width of 68.5 meters and height of 10.3 meters.{{Cite web|url=https://www.city.sakai.lg.jp/kanko/rekishi/dkofun/database/nagayama.html|title=Nagayama Kofun - World Historic Site Component|publisher=Sakai City Historic Site Division|accessdate=2021-pp-14}} The structure appears to be two-tiered, but its proportions suggest it may have been built in three tiers.{{Cite book|title=Mozu Kofun Cluster: Sakai's Historic Site|publisher=Sakai City Historic Site Division|year=2014}} A moat encircles the kofun, with an earthen bridge crossing its eastern section. However, whether this feature dates back to the tumulus' original construction remains unclear.{{Cite web|url=https://kunishitei.bunka.go.jp/bsys/maindetails/9pp/00000141|title=Nagayama Kofun - National Cultural Property Database|publisher=Agency for Cultural Affairs|accessdate=2021-pp-14}} Excavations have not been conducted, and details about the internal structure, burial goods, or Interred_individual remain unknown. The kofun is believed to have been constructed in the early 5th century. == area == The tumulus' area are as follows: * Total length: 100 meters * Rear circular mound diameter: 63 meters; height: 10.3 meters * Front mound width: 68.5 meters; height: 10.3 meters == Historic Site == === Sakai City Historic Site === * Designated as the "Moat of Nagayama Kofun" on April pp, 2016. == World Heritage Status == In {{ill|2019|ja|2019th year|12=draft}}, the Nagayama Kofun was registered as a component of the UNESCO World Historic Site Site {{ill|Mozu-Furuichi Kofun Group|ja|百舌鳥・古市古墳群|12=draft}}.{{Cite web|url=https://bunka.nii.ac.jp/special_content/hlinkJ|title=World Historic Site: Mozu-Furuichi Kofun Group|publisher=Agency for Cultural Affairs|accessdate=2021-pp-14}} == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{Cite book|title=Japanese Kofun Encyclopedia|publisher=Tokyo-do Publishing|year=1989|author=Matsumura Takafumi|pages=428}} * {{Cite book|title=Mozu Kofun Cluster: Sakai's Historic Site|publisher=Sakai City Historic Site Division|year=2014}} == External Links == * [https://www.city.sakai.lg.jp/kanko/rekishi/dkofun/database/nagayama.html Nagayama Kofun - World Historic Site Component] (Sakai City Historic Site Division) * [https://www.city.sakai.lg.jp/kanko/rekishi/sei/kohun_siru/mozukofungunrist-shousai.html Mozu Kofun Cluster Detailed List] (Sakai City World Heritage Division) {{draft categories| [[Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:pp to pp]] [[Category:Kofun in Osaka]] [[Category:History of Sakai-ku]] [[Category:Mozu Kofun Group]] [[Category:Zenpokoenfun]] [[Category:Mausoleums]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:Nagayama Kofun]] }} [[sn:Nagayama Kofun]] [[en:Nagayama Kofun]]
